title: verified-sabr: A Lean 4 Formalization of Schedule-Aware Bundle Routing
description: A Lean 4 formalization of Schedule-Aware Bundle Routing (CCSDS 734.3-B-1), the standardized form of Contact Graph Routing used in delay-tolerant space networks. It provides an executable earliest-arrival route search over ION-style contact plans with exact rational arithmetic, a machine-checked soundness theorem (every returned route is plan-drawn, adjacent, and window-feasible), a machine-checked earliest-arrival optimality theorem (the T2b result), and a differential harness against ION 4.1.4. Found/none verdicts and earliest-arrival times agree on 4100 of 4100 route queries across 1000 generated cislunar contact plans. Full four-key route selection is conformant on 3882 of 4093 dispatches; the residual is disclosed rather than claimed as optimal. Both machine-checked theorems reduce to the standard classical axioms only (propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound).
